title: equisetum majus var. serotinum
intro: Equisetum majus var. serotinum, also known as the tall horsetail, is a plant species that belongs to the genus Equisetum and is characterized by its tall, hollow stems and feathery foliage. The tall horsetail has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the high silica content in the plant. The health benefits of Equisetum majus var. serotinum include its ability to support urinary tract health, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a popular natural remedy for various health issues. Equisetum majus var. serotinum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or powder for herbal use, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
